title: 10 Signs God Is Working in a Man (Before He Can See It)
caption:
You won't feel it while it's happening.

Formation doesn't usually show up as a dramatic shift. It shows up as small changes in first instincts — slower to react, more bothered by your own sin than others', keeping your word when no one's watching, praying for someone and meaning it.

God is more patient than you are. He's working in the quiet, in the Monday routine, in the season that feels like nothing's happening.

"He who began a good work in you will bring it to completion." Philippians 1:6.

You're not stuck. You're being built.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #formation #christianity #discipleship #spiritualgrowth #scripture
theme: He walks humbly. He's not the main character.
